creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gerald Pfeifer from comment #6)
> Will you be able to help and sync that with the lists Antoine provided?

Done. +1 to unmaintained list *without* bugs. Sorry, I couldn't find time to help with fixes.

  astro/gpstk
  benchmarks/polygraph
  cad/alliance
  databases/fastdb
  devel/pwlib
  devel/rhtvision
  emulators/pearpc
  lang/gprolog (i386-only)
  mail/annoyance-filter
  sysutils/pesign
